creator: trueos@norwegianrockcat.com
text:
Sorry about the changelog. I'll remember to do that next time.

I think it can safely MFH to 2022Q2 and I'm not sure the if the client in Quarterly is still working (it's several months old and it depends on what Jotta's servers allow). On the other hand, the branch to Q3 is less than two weeks away, so it can likely wait too.
